creator: brad@brad-x.com
text:
As an addendum, the kernel message setup.bin exited on signal 11 (core 
dumped) appears, and the port seems to clean up after itself, removing 
the corefile.

This port has worked for me one out of six times, each attempt on 
different boxes, both my own and those set up by others - apparently 
conditions in the majority of cases are not favorable to install this port.

Please fix!

Brad
